0.content:
## GitHub Pages & Real User Monitoring
Page load BizEvents from all `dynatrace-wwse.github.io` documentation sites. App ID: `ff78563295ff1e42`.

1.title: Page Views (7d)
1.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "page_load"
| summarize total = count()

2.title: Unique Sessions (7d)
2.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "page_load"
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(`dt.rum.session.id`)

3.title: Countries Reached (7d)
3.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "page_load"
| summarize countries = countDistinct(`geo.country.name`)

4.title: Docs Sites Active (7d)
4.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "page_load"
| summarize sites = countDistinct(`event.provider`)

5.title: Page Views Over Time (daily)

6.title: Top Pages
6.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "page_load"
| summarize views = count(), by:{page}
| sort views desc
| limit 20

7.title: Views by Country
7.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "page_load"
| summarize views = count(), sessions = countDistinct(`dt.rum.session.id`), by:{`geo.country.name`, `geo.continent.name`}
| sort views desc
| limit 20

8.title: Views by Device Type
8.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "page_load"
| summarize views = count(), by:{`device.type`}
| sort views desc

9.title: Views by Browser
9.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "page_load"
| summarize views = count(), by:{`browser.name`}
| sort views desc

10.title: Sessions by Page — Detail
10.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "page_load"
| summarize views = count(), sessions = countDistinct(`dt.rum.session.id`), by:{page, `event.provider`}
| sort views desc
| limit 30
